_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.
clinical_indications: Pathology of the lower thoracic and upper lumbar spine
Any procedure on lung, thoracic esophagus, aorta

preauth.label: Clinical notes with evaluation findings, indication of procedure, and planned line of management

claim.label: Detailed Indoor case papers (ICPs) with treatment details

ppd_preauth.q: Clinical notes - detailed history, signs & symptoms, evaluation findings, planned line of treatment, indication for procedure?
Did CT/MRI Chest/Abdomen confirm the diagnosis?
Was the evaluation findings and imaging indicative of surgery?

cpd_claim.q: Are the detailed ICPs with daily vitals and treatment details provided?
Are the detailed procedure / Operative Notes available?
Is the Discharge summary with follow-up advice at the time of discharge submitted?

common_queries: Evaluation findings or imaging were not indicative of surgery.
Clinical notes are missing or incomplete, or do not clearly state history, symptoms, evaluation findings, planned treatment, or indication for procedure during pre-authorization.
CT/MRI Chest/Abdomen report is missing or did not confirm the diagnosis during pre-authorization.
Detailed procedure or operative notes are missing or incomplete in the claim submission.
Post-operative Chest/Abdomen X-ray or USG report is missing in the claim submission.
Detailed Indoor Case Papers (ICPs) with daily vitals and treatment details are missing or incomplete in the claim submission.

clinical_key_pointers: The thoracoabdominal incision provides wide exposure of the lower thorax, the upper abdomen, and the retroperitoneal space.
